    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
    This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
    This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation

    This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.

    Class and Description
    SLExceptionFactory
    Factory for exception during parsing of specification languages.
    SLExpression
    This class represents the translation of an expression of an arbitrary specification language, which in the KeY world is either a term or a type.

    Expression resolvers are used by specification parsers (e.g.
    SLParameters
    Wraps a list of expressions.
    SLResolverManager
    Resolves property calls of any kind.
